web.title: Deploying with the CLI | Railway Docs
web.description: When running railway up from a subdirectory without a path argument, Railway still deploys from the project root. To deploy only a specific ...

web.title: CLI | Railway Docs
web.description: The Railway CLI is open source. Contribute to the development of the Railway CLI by opening an issue or Pull Request on the GitHub Repo .

web.title: railway up | Railway Docs
web.description: Upload and deploy your project from the current directory to Railway. Note: This command uploads and deploys your local code.

web.title: Service deploying without connected branch - Railway Help Station
web.description: For your dev workflow, instead of connecting a branch and risking unwanted auto-deploys, you can use railway up from the CLI and push manually whenever you want ...

web.title: Cline + Railway
web.description: Ask Cline to deploy to Railway. It will show you each command ( railway login , railway up ) before executing. Approve each step for full control.
